response.global_analysis: The Reference JSON contains lyrics that do not appear in this video segment; I have discarded them. The audio consists of background music with clear promotional voice-overs starting at 04:11. I have transcribed the spoken announcements and translated key on-screen information for context. Timing is strictly tied to the vocal delivery and visual transitions.

subtitles.original: Attention ご来場のお客様へ

EXPOのバンダイブースも開催！
subtitles.english: The Bandai booth at the EXPO is also open!

subtitles.english: We're waiting for you at the venue!
